flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of South Alabama rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.8k → $10.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of South Alabama rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.0k → $19.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of South Alabama fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of South Alabama rose 32% between 2021 and 2024 (27.9% → 36.7%).
